problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Liquid crystal elastomer actuation is applied to low, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
